meaning: adj.直立的,停滞的,固定的,常备的,标准的,常设的n.站立,身分,名望,持续v.站
examples: Lee was standing right behind her.
Who's the girl standing behind Jan?
We waited, standing up, for an hour.
Great John Street has pretty spectacular rooms, with Egyptian cotton sheets and free-standing baths.
By 2010, the 37-year-old, standing at 5'10, hit his peak weight of 270 pounds.
